phrases.text_local: Você conhece algum restaurante típico perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: voh-SEH koo-NYEH-sih ahl-GOONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar na receção do castelo ou no mercado, eles indicam boas opções típicas.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH reh-sih-SOWN DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo OHW NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo, EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng BOHUHSH awp-SOHNYSH TEE-pee-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask at the castle reception or at the market, they can point out good typical options.

responses.english: You can ask at the castle reception or at the market, they can point out good typical options.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH reh-sih-SOWN DOO kuhsh-TEH-loo OHW NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo, EH-lihsh een-DEE-kuhng BOHUHSH awp-SOHNYSH TEE-pee-kuhsh.
responses.french: Pode perguntar na receção do castelo ou no mercado, eles indicam boas opções típicas.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Mercado da Ribeira?
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh fish and local produce sold daily.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto à ponte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH POHNG-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is right next to the bridge.

responses.english: Good morning, it is right next to the bridge.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH POHNG-tih.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica junto à ponte.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Ponte Romana.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih roo-MAHN-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Roman Bridge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Roman Bridge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH POHNG-tih roo-MAHN-nuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Ponte Romana.

phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a Igreja de Santa Maria?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee shi lo-ka-LEE-zah ah ee-GREH-zhah jee-SAN-tah mah-REE-ah
phrases.cultural_note: Known for its distinctive white bell tower.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao castelo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW kuhsh-TEH-loo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the castle.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the castle.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW kuhsh-TEH-loo.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica junto ao castelo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Republic Square is
phrases.text_local: Como chego à Praça da República?

likely_response.local: Bom dia, é a praça central.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, EH AH PRAH-suh sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is the central square.

responses.english: Good morning, it is the central square.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, EH AH PRAH-suh sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, é a praça central.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Mercado da Ribeira?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FEE-kah oo mer-KAH-doo dah hee-BAY-rah
phrases.cultural_note: Mercado da Ribeira is Tavira's historic riverfront market, famous for fresh seafood and local produce.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica perto da Ponte Romana.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH POHNG-tih roo-MAHN-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's near the Roman Bridge.

responses.english: Good morning, it's near the Roman Bridge.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh PEHR-too DUH POHNG-tih roo-MAHN-nuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica perto da Ponte Romana.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the church donation box is
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra a caixa de donativos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AH KEYE-shuh DIH doo-nuh-TEE-voosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Small contributions help maintain the historic building.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the castle ticket kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar o bilhete para o castelo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR AW bee-LYEH-tih PUH-ruh AW kuhsh-TEH-loo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Castelo de Tavira. Lá encontrará o bilheteiro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuhsh-TEH-loo DIH tuh-VEE-ruh. LAH ayng-koongt-ruh-RAH AW bee-lyih-TAY-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Castelo de Tavira. There you will find the ticket seller.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Castelo de Tavira. There you will find the ticket seller.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuhsh-TEH-loo DIH tuh-VEE-ruh. LAH ayng-koongt-ruh-RAH AW bee-lyih-TAY-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Castelo de Tavira. Lá encontrará o bilheteiro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main square is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a praça principal do centro histórico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PRAH-suh preen-see-PAHL DOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals use this square as the main meeting point.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Praça da República.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Praça da República.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Praça da República.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Praça da República.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the river boat desk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de embarque do rio?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH aym-BAH-ruh-kih DOO REEOO?
phrases.cultural_note: Boats depart daily from the riverbank.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o cais.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the pier.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the pier.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o cais.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o cais de partida dos barcos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEYESH DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duh DOOSH BAH-ruh-koosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o cais de partida dos barcos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duh DOOSH BAH-ruh-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the boat departure dock.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the boat departure dock.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duh DOOSH BAH-ruh-koosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o cais de partida dos barcos.
